iran_nuke.notes: Day 15 21:00 — ELEVATED STABLE. No new nuclear-specific signals. Hegseth claims Iran missile capacity 'down 90%', drones 'down 95%' — if true, increases desperation calculus for nuclear option but no weapons-grade enrichment or test yet. IAEA hidden HEU (460kg of 60%) remains dominant factor. 14 + 12 (hidden HEU) = 26.

iran_conventional.notes: Day 15 21:00 — IMMINENT RISING. NEW: (1) Qatar hit — 4 ballistic missiles + drones, all intercepted. Blast over Doha, temporary evacuations (AJ). Qatar now 4th Gulf state targeted (UAE, Saudi, Kuwait, Qatar). (2) Oman — 2 killed by Iranian drones. First Oman casualties, expanding theater (AJ). (3) Kuwait airport hit by fresh drone attacks (HT). (4) Fujairah fire — bunkering hub blaze after interception debris, oil-loading suspended (AJ/Reuters). (5) Hegseth claims Iran missile capacity 'down 90%', drones 'down 95%' — US assesses Iran weakening but sustained attacks continue. (6) UAE intercepted 9 BMs + 33 drones — 42-projectile barrage, largest on Gulf state territory. Capped at 100.

israel_lebanon.notes: Day 15 21:00 — IMMINENT STABLE. NEW: Lebanon reportedly opening negotiation track with Israel (HT). First diplomatic signal from Lebanese side — if formal talks begin, -8 applies. Ground invasion still ongoing, 634+ killed, 800K-1M displaced. Score reduced from 100→92 with negotiation signal. Watch: if negotiations formalize, further de-escalation possible.

turkey.notes: IMMINENT STABLE. No new intercepts since third confirmed March 13. Article 4 consultations remain one-intercept threshold away. Iran now targeting 4 Gulf states — may reduce Turkey corridor focus. 65 + 6 (Iran coupling) = 71.

india.notes: ELEVATED STABLE. No new developments. India remains diplomatically engaged but no military escalation signals. 20 (stable).

russia.notes: CRITICAL STABLE. No major new developments. Russia benefiting from $100+ oil while selling at discount. Kharg Island + Fujairah disruptions further tighten oil market to Russia's benefit. 42 (stable).

china.notes: DETERRENT STABLE. China has not responded to Trump's Hormuz warship request. Warplane flights near Taiwan remain low. China mediating Pakistan-Afghanistan. No new signals. 15 (stable).

north_korea.notes: CRITICAL STABLE. 10+ ballistic missiles confirmed — same event as 19:00 scan. Third provocation this week during US-SK 'Freedom Shield' drills. No new launches. 41 (stable).

russia_ukraine.notes: CRITICAL STABLE. No new Ukraine developments this hour. 430 drones + 68 missiles attack earlier today still dominant signal. Russia expanding drone output to 19,000/day. 56 + 5 (coupling) = 61.

pakistan_afghanistan.notes: IMMINENT RISING — DAY 15 21:00. Afghan claim of killing 14 Pakistani soldiers remains unconfirmed but unrefuted — Pakistan still silent. Kam Air fuel depot at Kandahar burning after Pakistan strike. No Pakistani response announcement yet. Watch for escalation trigger. 80 (stable).

changed_signals.de_escalation_watch: PARTIAL DE-ESCALATION SIGNAL: Lebanon opening negotiation track — first diplomatic signal from Lebanese side. If formal talks begin, Israel-Lebanon score could drop further. However, Iran expanding Gulf strikes to Qatar (4th state) and Oman (first casualties) continues escalation. Hegseth claims Iran 'down 90%' on missiles — if accurate, may force Iran toward negotiations or toward nuclear desperation. GLOBAL: 75% IMMINENT (slight decrease from 76% due to Lebanon negotiation signal). FIVE trackers IMMINENT: Iran conventional (100), Israel-Lebanon (92), Pakistan-Afghanistan (80), Turkey (65/71). THREE CRITICAL: Russia-Ukraine (56/61), Russia (42/50), DPRK (41). WATCH: (a) Lebanon negotiations — will they formalize? (b) Qatar escalation cycle — Iran's 4th Gulf target. (c) Oman casualties — first non-Gulf state civilian deaths from Iran. (d) Pakistan response to Afghan soldier kill claim still pending. (e) Iran 'down 90%' claim — does sustained attack continue despite degradation?

latest_news.headline: Qatar hit — 4 ballistic missiles + drones intercepted over Doha, temp evacuations
latest_news.text: Qatar's Ministry of Defence confirmed 4 ballistic missiles and several drones launched from Iran, all intercepted. Large blast over Doha skies at 1:30am Saturday. Temporary evacuation measures in some areas. Qatar now 4th Gulf state targeted.

latest_news.headline: Oman — 2 killed by Iranian drones, first Oman casualties
latest_news.text: Two people killed in Oman by Iranian drones, several also fired at Saudi Arabia. First confirmed civilian casualties in Oman from Iran's Gulf campaign, expanding the theater beyond traditional Gulf Cooperation Council states.

latest_news.headline: Kuwait airport hit by fresh drone attacks
latest_news.text: Fresh drone attacks reported on Kuwait airport area. Iran continues targeting Kuwaiti territory. UAE senior official Gargash: Iran's strategy targeting Arab Gulf states reveals 'military impotence, moral bankruptcy, and political isolation.'

latest_news.headline: Lebanon opens negotiation track with Israel
latest_news.text: Reports that Lebanon is opening a negotiation channel with Israel. First diplomatic signal from Lebanese side since ground invasion began. Significance TBD — could be formal ceasefire track or limited humanitarian pause.

latest_news.headline: Hegseth claims Iran missile capacity 'down 90%', drones 'down 95%'
latest_news.text: US Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth says joint US-Israeli strikes have significantly diminished Iran's military capabilities. Missile volume 'down 90%' and drone volume 'down 95%.' Iran's sustained attacks continue despite claimed degradation.

latest_news.headline: UAE intercepts 9 ballistic missiles + 33 drones — 42-projectile barrage
latest_news.text: UAE air defences intercepted 9 Iranian ballistic missiles and 33 drones on Saturday. Combined 42-projectile barrage — Iran's largest attack on Gulf state territory since war began. Fire at Fujairah bunkering hub from interception debris.

latest_news.headline: Fujairah oil terminal fire — loading operations suspended
latest_news.text: Fire broke out at Fujairah bunkering hub after interception debris fell during drone attack. Oil-loading operations suspended. Fujairah handles ~1M barrels/day of UAE Murban crude. Jordanian citizen lightly injured.

latest_news.headline: IRGC declares UAE ports 'legitimate targets', urges civilian evacuation
latest_news.text: IRGC statement: US interests in UAE including ports, docks and military locations are 'legitimate targets.' Urges UAE residents to evacuate ports and US military shelters. Iran state media reports IRGC targeting 'origin of American enemy missiles.'

outlook: CRITICAL IMMINENT — Global war probability 75% IMMINENT (Day 15 21:00). ESCALATION EXPANDS: (1) QATAR HIT — 4th Gulf state targeted (UAE, Saudi, Kuwait, Qatar). 4 ballistic missiles + drones intercepted over Doha. (2) OMAN — 2 killed by Iranian drones, first Oman casualties. Theater expanding beyond GCC. (3) KUWAIT airport hit by fresh drones — continued targeting. (4) FUJAIRAH fire — world's largest bunkering hub offline, oil-loading suspended. De-ESCALATION SIGNAL: (5) LEBANON opens negotiation track with Israel — first diplomatic signal from Lebanese side. Hegseth claims Iran 'down 90%' on missiles — if true, may force Iran toward desperation or negotiations. SEVEN trackers: 4 IMMINENT (Iran 100, Israel-Lebanon 92, Pakistan-Afghan 80, Turkey 65/71), 3 CRITICAL (Russia-Ukraine 56/61, Russia 42/50, DPRK 41). WATCH: (a) Lebanon negotiations formalizing? (b) Iran 4th+ Gulf state expansion — GCC collective response? (c) Oman escalation — non-Gulf state casualties. (d) Pakistan still silent on Afghan soldier kill claim. (e) Oil supply — Fujairah + Kharg + Kuwait disruptions. (f) Iran 'down 90%' — does claimed degradation actually slow attacks?
